title: minuartia graminifolia var. italica
intro: Minuartia graminifolia var. italica, also known as Italian thyme or creeping thyme, is a low-growing, spreading perennial herb that belongs to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, cuts, and skin infections. The health benefits of Minuartia graminifolia var. italica include its ability to improve respiratory health, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system, while its herbal preparations include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used topically or internally. Additionally, the plant's essential oil has been used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce inflammation.
